mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_NOTIFICATION_ZONE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}

SELECT homepage_id, notification_zone_idx, notification_zone_code, title, sub_title, contents, start_date, end_date, link_type, link_target, link_url, use_yn, add_date, add_id, modify_date, modify_id FROM CMS_NOTIFICATION_ZONE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND notification_zone_idx = #{notification_zone_idx}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT homepage_id, notification_zone_idx, notification_zone_code, (SELECT code_name FROM cms_code WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND group_id = 'A0001' AND code_id = A.notification_zone_code) AS notification_zone_code_name, title, sub_title, contents, start_date, end_date, link_type, link_target, link_url, use_yn, add_date, add_id, modify_date, modify_id FROM cms_notification_zone A WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND notification_zone_code = #{notification_zone_code} AND use_yn = 'Y' AND SYSDATE >= TO_DATE(start_date||'000000', 'YYYY-MM-DDhh24MISS') AND SYSDATE <= TO_DATE(end_date||'235959', 'YYYY-MM-DDhh24MISS') ORDER BY notification_zone_idx DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(notification_zone_idx),0)+1 FROM CMS_NOTIFICATION_ZONE
INSERT INTO CMS_NOTIFICATION_ZONE ( homepage_id, notification_zone_idx, notification_zone_code, title, sub_title, contents, start_date, end_date, link_type, link_target, link_url, use_yn, add_date, add_id, modify_date, modify_id ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{notification_zone_idx}, #{notification_zone_code}, #{title}, #{sub_title}, #{contents}, #{start_date}, #{end_date}, #{link_type}, #{link_target}, #{link_url}, #{use_yn}, SYSDATE, #{auth_id}, SYSDATE, #{auth_id} )
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_NOTIFICATION_ZONE SET title = #{title}, sub_title = #{sub_title}, contents = #{contents}, start_date = #{start_date}, end_date = #{end_date}, link_type = #{link_type}, link_target = #{link_target}, link_url = #{link_url}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, modify_date = #{modify_date}, modify_id = #{auth_id} WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND notification_zone_idx = #{notification_zone_idx}
